subject: Here's the "lost chapter" (open now)
body:
Perfect. Love it. Here's the "the lost chapter" for you. Tap the link now while you have this email open.

Hey,

Perfect. Love it.

Here's the "lost chapter" for you.

Tap that link now while you have this email open.

You'll discover:

- The optimal amount of steps (in your marketing and sales) that generate the highest return on advertising over the long haul.
- Why you must ignore "the ladder" every guru and expert talks about. They mean well but it wreaks havoc on your retention and profitability.
- The only 3 things you must do today that will trigger an endless surge in fresh leads and buyers by tomorrow (at the latest).

Let me know,

Alex

P.S. I've got a bunch more emails lined up for you. They'll cover nuances, distinctions and hard-won discoveries my team and I are capturing weekly from growing our portfolio companies. I'll share as much as I can without breaking any NDA's or agreements. Stay tuned.
